title: cylindropuntia californica subsp. californica
intro: Cylindropuntia californica subsp. californica, also known as California cholla, is a species of cholla cactus that belongs to the Opuntia genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Cylindropuntia californica subsp. californica include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against microbial infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into salves, ointments, and teas, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
